events.description: 11:45 PM. Slack pings. The VP wants a 'quick sync' on the Q3 deck. You know they're just lonely and want someone to witness their power at midnight.
The server is melting. The investors are calling. You're selling your 20s for a 0.01% stake in a company that makes an app for dog hats. Is this the 'dream'?
Client wants a 'minor' revision. It's the 14th one. You're working for $3/hour now. You left your job for 'freedom', but you've never been more of a slave.
Reviewer #2 says your life's work is 'derivative'. You've spent 6 years on this. Your peers are buying houses. You're buying instant noodles.
The app says you're 2 minutes behind. Your rating is 4.8. If it hits 4.7, you're deactivated. You're a line of code in a spreadsheet. Move faster.

choices.text: Take a break. Lose the shift.

events.description: Your 4th coffee. It's cold. You're drinking it anyway because you've forgotten how to feel awake without a chemical intervention.
3:12 AM. You open your laptop again. No one asked you to. There is no deadline. You just don't know who you are when you aren't working.
A message from someone who loves you. You haven't replied in 4 days. You told yourself you're 'too busy', but you spent 2 hours scrolling today.
You're looking at a peer's LinkedIn. They just got promoted. You're happy for them, but mostly you just feel like a slow-motion failure.
Your back is screaming. Your eyes are burning. You haven't stood up in 6 hours. The chair is becoming part of your skeleton.
Mandatory 'Fun' Friday. Karaoke starts in 5 minutes.
UNEXPECTED BEHAVIOR DETECTED. SYSTEM INTEGRITY: 12%. RECOVERY IMPOSSIBLE.
The office dog bit a VC. The series B is in jeopardy.

endings.title: SYSTEM_FAILURE
endings.description: The mind is a corrupted file. You are a ghost in the machine. Productivity: 0%.

endings.title: ASCENSION
endings.description: You are the machine. Ego has consumed the self. The board is pleased.

endings.title: DEPLETED
endings.description: The battery is dead. You are a hollow shell in a designer suit.

endings.title: INSOMNIA
endings.description: The sun never rises. The sun never sets. Only the screen glows.

endings.title: BANKRUPT
endings.description: The account is empty. The self is empty. The system discards you.

randomMessages: Your friends are hanging out without you.
You're not as special as you think.
The system doesn't care about your 'passion'.
Is this who you wanted to be?
You're just a battery for a billionaire.
